meaning: to learn, to acquire knowledge of
trigger_situations: Learning a skill, trade, or subject in formal or informal settings.
substitution_slots: Complement can be a skill, language, trade, or discipline.
variations: faire l'apprentissage, être en apprentissage de
common_mistakes: Confusing with apprendre (simpler form); incorrect preposition.
interference_warnings: L1 speakers may use simpler forms; less formal register.
nuance: Emphasizes structured, sustained learning of a skill or trade.
recall_cue: Learning a trade or skill through practice
chunk_family: faire l'apprentissage de + objet, apprentissage professionnel
example_1: Il a fait l'apprentissage de trois langues étrangères.
example_2: Elle a fait l'apprentissage du métier de menuisier par stages successifs.
example_3: Les étudiants font l'apprentissage de la programmation informatique.
example_2_translation: She learned the carpentry trade through successive internships.

meaning: to be able to, to be in a position to
trigger_situations: Stating capacity to perform a task, provide a solution, or accomplish a goal.
contexts: Professional settings, formal proposals, capability assessment.
substitution_slots: Infinitive can be any action verb.
common_substitutions: pouvoir, être capable de, être en mesure de
variations: à même de (prepositional), être en mesure de
similar_contrasting: pouvoir (less formal), être capable de (more accessible)
interference_warnings: Formal register; may be overused in informal speech.
nuance: More formal and official than pouvoir; emphasizes readiness.
upgrade_path: avoir la capacité de, être en position de
example_1: Nous sommes à même de vous proposer une solution adaptée.
example_2: Cette méthode n'est pas à même de résoudre le problème complexe.
example_3: L'équipe est à même de livrer le projet dans les délais prévus.
example_1_translation: We are able to offer you a suitable solution.
example_2_translation: This method is not able to resolve the complex problem.
example_3_translation: The team is able to deliver the project on schedule.

meaning: in view of, with regard to
trigger_situations: Comparing standards, evaluating against criteria, presenting context.
contexts: Formal writing, legal documents, academic discourse.
substitution_slots: Noun can be criteria, law, results, standards.
common_substitutions: par rapport à, en comparaison de, selon
common_mistakes: Using à la place of au; confusing with par rapport à.
interference_warnings: Formal/legal context; not for casual speech.
nuance: Emphasizes a reference point or standard of judgment.
pragmatic_effect: Adds formality and objectivity to statements.
upgrade_path: en comparaison de, selon les normes
example_1: Au regard des résultats obtenus, nous devons réviser notre stratégie.
example_2: Au regard de la loi, cette pratique est expressément interdite.
example_3: Au regard des objectifs fixés, nous avons atteint 85% de nos cibles.
example_1_translation: In view of the results obtained, we must revise our strategy.
example_2_translation: Under the law, this practice is expressly prohibited.
example_3_translation: Compared to the stated objectives, we achieved 85% of our targets.

meaning: with a view to, for the purpose of
trigger_situations: Stating goals, explaining reasons for actions, planning activities.
contexts: Formal proposals, project planning, official correspondence.
substitution_slots: Complement can be noun or infinitive-derived noun.
common_substitutions: pour, afin de, dans le but de
variations: en vue de + noun, en vue d'un accord, en vue de préparer
common_mistakes: Using pour instead; incorrect article after de.
similar_contrasting: pour (simpler, more common), afin de (more formal)
interference_warnings: Formal register; common in professional writing.
nuance: More formal than pour; implies strategic intent.
upgrade_path: dans le but de, en vue de + infinitive
example_1: Il a pris des mesures en vue de prévenir tout incident futur.
example_2: Nous planifions cette rencontre en vue d'un accord durable.
example_3: La formation a été organisée en vue d'améliorer les compétences.
example_1_translation: He took measures to prevent any future incident.
example_2_translation: We are planning this meeting with a view to a lasting agreement.
example_3_translation: The training was organized to improve skills.

trigger_situations: Reinterpreting information, explaining decisions after new facts, reassessing.
contexts: Academic analysis, formal reports, explanatory texts.
pattern: à la lumière de + noun phrase
substitution_slots: Noun can be discoveries, facts, evidence, events.
common_substitutions: à cause de, en raison de, étant donné
variations: à la lumière des faits, à la lumière de ces informations
common_mistakes: Confusing with similar expressions; word order errors.
interference_warnings: Academic/formal register; less common in speech.
nuance: Emphasizes illumination or clarification through new information.
upgrade_path: en raison de, compte tenu de
example_1: À la lumière des dernières découvertes scientifiques, cette théorie s'effondre.
example_2: À la lumière de ces événements récents, nous devons repenser notre approche.
example_3: À la lumière des témoignages recueillis, l'enquête prend une direction nouvelle.
example_1_translation: In light of the latest scientific discoveries, this theory collapses.
example_2_translation: In light of these recent events, we must rethink our approach.
example_3_translation: In light of the testimonies collected, the investigation takes a new direction.

trigger_situations: Discussing rights, availability of services, information access.
contexts: Educational settings, healthcare, technology, social discussions.
substitution_slots: Noun can be services, resources, information, locations.
common_substitutions: pouvoir accéder à, obtenir l'accès à, entrer
variations: avoir accès à + article + noun, donner accès à
common_mistakes: Forgetting preposition à; using sur instead.
similar_contrasting: pouvoir accéder à (less direct), entrer (physical access)
nuance: Neutral, factual statement of access or right.
pragmatic_effect: States capability or right without emotional coloring.
example_1: Tous les citoyens devraient avoir accès à l'éducation de qualité.
example_2: Les chercheurs n'ont pas accès à ces données confidentielles de l'entreprise.
example_3: Les patients ont maintenant accès à des traitements innovants.
example_1_translation: All citizens should have access to quality education.
example_2_translation: Researchers do not have access to this company's confidential data.
example_3_translation: Patients now have access to innovative treatments.

meaning: to lay the groundwork, to set milestones
trigger_situations: Starting a project, establishing milestones, creating framework.
substitution_slots: Can specify type of milestone or area.
common_substitutions: établir les bases, créer une fondation
variations: poser les premiers jalons, poser les jalons de
similar_contrasting: établir les bases (literal), jeter les fondations (literal)
nuance: Metaphorical: jalons (mile markers on roads) = project milestones.
example_1: Ce projet pose les jalons d'une nouvelle ère scientifique en biotechnologie.
example_2: Nous avons posé les premiers jalons de notre collaboration internationale.
example_3: La signature du traité a posé les jalons de la paix régionale.
example_1_translation: This project lays the foundations for a new era in biotechnology.
example_2_translation: We have laid the first milestones of our international collaboration.
example_3_translation: The treaty signing laid the groundwork for regional peace.

meaning: to serve as proof, to be evidence of
trigger_situations: Legal contexts, verification, validation of claims.
contexts: Legal documents, formal attestations, official verification.
substitution_slots: Noun can be document, evidence, testimony.
variations: faire foi entre, faire pleine foi
common_mistakes: Confusing with avoir foi (to have faith); literal errors.
nuance: Legal/formal: documents have validity, serve as evidence.
example_1: Ces documents font foi de la validité de la transaction commerciale.
example_2: L'accord signé par les deux parties fait foi entre elles.
example_3: Le certificat fait foi de l'authenticité du produit.
example_1_translation: These documents constitute proof of the validity of the commercial transaction.
example_2_translation: The agreement signed by the two parties is binding between them.
example_3_translation: The certificate serves as proof of the product's authenticity.

meaning: it turns out that, it transpires that
trigger_situations: Revealing unexpected findings, presenting surprises, corrections.
common_substitutions: il se trouve que, il se donne que, on découvre que
variations: il s'avère que, il s'avèrera que, il s'est avéré que
common_mistakes: Tense confusion; word order in clause.
similar_contrasting: il se trouve que (less formal), apparemment (adverbial)
nuance: Signals discovery or revelation; something becomes apparent.
pragmatic_effect: Introduces surprising or important new information.
example_1: Il s'avère que le problème était bien plus complexe qu'il n'y paraissait.
example_2: Il s'est avéré que nos soupçons initiaux étaient tout à fait fondés.
example_3: Il s'avère maintenant que cette technologie révolutionnaire était possible.
example_1_translation: It turns out the problem was far more complex than it appeared.
example_2_translation: It turned out that our initial suspicions were completely justified.
example_3_translation: It turns out now that this revolutionary technology was possible.

meaning: at the risk of, at the peril of
trigger_situations: Describing heroic actions, sacrifices, dangerous situations.
contexts: Narratives, dramatic accounts, discussions of risk.
substitution_slots: Noun can be life, safety, career, reputation.
common_substitutions: au risque de, en mettant en danger
variations: au péril de leur vie, au péril de sa réputation
common_mistakes: Confusing péril with other French words; preposition errors.
interference_warnings: Formal/dramatic register; less common in casual speech.
nuance: Emphasizes grave danger; often used in heroic contexts.
pragmatic_effect: Adds dramatic weight and gravity to statement.
upgrade_path: en mettant en danger, au risque de
example_1: Ils ont agi au péril de leur propre sécurité pour sauver les civils.
example_2: Au péril de leur vie, les pompiers ont sauvé les otages du bâtiment.
example_3: Elle a parlé au péril de sa réputation et de sa carrière.
example_1_translation: They acted at the risk of their own safety to save civilians.
example_2_translation: At the risk of their lives, firefighters saved the hostages from the building.
example_3_translation: She spoke at the risk of her reputation and career.

trigger_situations: Criticizing rash decisions, random actions, unfounded claims.
contexts: Critiques, complaints, discussions of poor judgment.
pattern: à tort et à travers + verb phrase
substitution_slots: Used with verbs of speech, action, judgment.
common_substitutions: n'importe comment, sans fondement, sans raison
variations: critiquer à tort et à travers, parler à tort et à travers
common_mistakes: Word order; confusing with similar expressions.
similar_contrasting: sans fondement (simpler), à la légère (lighter dismissal)
nuance: Both à tort (wrongly) and à travers (haphazardly) emphasize lack of judgment.
example_1: Il critique tout à tort et à travers sans connaître les faits réels.
example_2: Ces accusations ont été portées à tort et à travers sans preuve.
example_3: On ne doit pas prendre des décisions à tort et à travers.
example_1_translation: He criticizes everything carelessly without knowing the facts.
example_2_translation: These accusations were made without foundation or evidence.
example_3_translation: One must not make decisions carelessly.

meaning: to make a clean sweep, to start fresh
trigger_situations: Starting over, abandoning old practices, fresh beginnings.
contexts: Organizational change, personal renewal, reform discussions.
substitution_slots: Can specify what is being discarded.
variations: faire table rase, faire table rase de
nuance: Metaphorical: wiping a table clean = erasing past.
example_1: Le nouveau gouvernement compte faire table rase des anciennes pratiques inefficaces.
example_2: Après la faillite, l'entreprise a fait table rase et recommencé.
example_3: Elle a décidé de faire table rase de son passé et de commencer une nouvelle vie.
example_1_translation: The new government intends to make a clean sweep of old ineffective practices.
example_2_translation: After bankruptcy, the company made a fresh start and began anew.
example_3_translation: She decided to wipe the slate clean and start a new life.

meaning: on the margins of, outside of
trigger_situations: Describing side events, peripheral roles, social exclusion.
contexts: Organizational discussions, social commentary, event planning.
substitution_slots: Noun can be event, society, system, norms.
common_substitutions: en dehors de, à l'écart de, en périphérie de
variations: en marge de + article + noun, rester en marge de
similar_contrasting: à l'écart de (more complete exclusion), à part
nuance: Suggests peripheral, secondary position; not fully integrated.
upgrade_path: en dehors de, à l'écart de
example_1: Des activités culturelles se déroulent en marge de la conférence principale.
example_2: Il vit en marge de la société, rejetant les normes établies.
example_3: Le groupe opérait en marge du système officiel.
example_1_translation: Cultural activities take place alongside the main conference.
example_2_translation: He lives on the margins of society, rejecting established norms.
example_3_translation: The group operated outside the official system.

meaning: in the heat of the moment, immediately
trigger_situations: Spontaneous responses, quick decisions, immediate reactions.
contexts: Conversations, criticism of hasty action, emotional responses.
pattern: à chaud + verb phrase / verb + à chaud
substitution_slots: Used with verbs of reaction, decision, response.
common_substitutions: immédiatement, sans réfléchir, sur le coup
variations: répondre à chaud, analyser à chaud, décision prise à chaud
nuance: Implies lack of reflection; emotional, unreasoned response.
example_1: Il a répondu à chaud sans prendre le temps de réfléchir à la question.
example_2: Cette décision stratégique ne doit jamais être prise à chaud.
example_3: En direct à la radio, elle a dû réagir à chaud sans préparation.
example_1_translation: He responded immediately without taking time to think about the question.
example_2_translation: This strategic decision should never be made hastily.
example_3_translation: Live on the radio, she had to react spontaneously without preparation.
